About-1.title: Strong academics with thoughtful student care.
About-1.subtitle: A balanced environment for learning and growth
About-1.desc: We help students build strong fundamentals, creative confidence, and real-world curiosity through guided learning.
About-1.desc2: Parents get clear communication, structured programs, and a school community focused on every child.
About-1.philosophyDesc: Learning works best when students feel seen, supported, and challenged at the right pace.

About-2.title: Strong academics with thoughtful student care.
About-2.subtitle: A balanced environment for learning and growth
About-2.desc: We help students build strong fundamentals, creative confidence, and real-world curiosity through guided learning.
About-2.desc2: Parents get clear communication, structured programs, and a school community focused on every child.
About-2.philosophyDesc: Learning works best when students feel seen, supported, and challenged at the right pace.

faqItems.question: Are admissions open?
faqItems.answer: Yes, admission enquiries can be submitted through the form section.

faqItems.question: Can parents visit campus?
faqItems.answer: Campus tours can be scheduled based on available slots.

faqItems.question: Which classes are available?
faqItems.answer: Program cards can show primary, middle, and senior school details.

Testimonial-1.title: Trusted by people who care about results.
Testimonial-1.desc: Use real customer feedback to build trust with new visitors.

testimonialItems.name: Aarav Mehta
testimonialItems.quote: The site made our work easier to understand and brought in better leads within the first week.

testimonialItems.name: Neha Kapoor
testimonialItems.quote: Clean sections, fast pages, and the editor keeps the content simple for our whole team.

testimonialItems.name: Rahul Verma
testimonialItems.quote: We finally have a website that looks premium and still feels practical to update.

testimonialItems.name: Isha Malhotra
testimonialItems.quote: The layouts gave our brand a sharper story and made every service easier to browse.

testimonialItems.name: Kabir Anand
testimonialItems.quote: We could test different sections quickly without losing the polished look of the page.

testimonialItems.name: Sara Khan
testimonialItems.quote: Visitors understand what we offer faster, and enquiries feel more relevant now.

AboutPage-1.title: We build thoughtful websites for growing brands.
AboutPage-1.desc: Our team combines strategy, design, and technology to create digital experiences that explain your business clearly and help visitors take action.
AboutPage-1.desc2: From the first idea to the final launch, we focus on useful content, clean layouts, and flexible sections that your team can keep improving over time.
AboutPage-1.subtitle: Our approach
AboutPage-1.philosophyDesc: We start by understanding the business, the audience, and the decisions visitors need to make. Then we shape pages around strong messaging, useful sections, and simple editing workflows.

AboutPage-2.desc: Our team combines strategy, design, and technology to create digital experiences that explain your business clearly and help visitors take action.

ServicePage-1.title: Helpful services built around your next step.
ServicePage-1.desc: Use this page to explain the core services, support, and outcomes your team provides for every visitor.
ServicePage-1.desc2: Each service card can be edited from the same JSON-backed editor, including text, images, and supporting details.
ServicePage-1.subtitle: What we provide

productSlides.productInfoDesc: Clarify goals, audience needs, and the right structure before visitors take action.
Present offers, proof, and conversion paths through clean editable sections.
Keep enquiries, updates, and follow-up simple for both visitors and your team.
Improve page content and calls to action as new visitor needs become clear.
